title: RiPP ecological roles - Key Findings
key_discoveries: RiPPs play critical roles in bacterial ecology and competition
Antiphage defense systems based on small peptides
RiPPs facilitate biofilm formation and maintenance
RiPPs mediate microbe-microbe and microbe-host interactions

antiphage_defense.mechanism: Small peptides (≤50 amino acids) act as antiphage defense
antiphage_defense.effectiveness: Important defense mechanism against viral predation

ecological_significance: RiPPs critical for bacterial survival in competitive environments
